description: Return the level of the provided player.
examples:
<sqf>
player addEventHandler ["Killed", {
	_killer = _this select 1;
	if (getPlayerLevel _killer < getCurrentPlayerLevel) then
	{
		hint "oooooooooh!";
	};
}];
</sqf>
name: getPlayerLevel

ret.desc: the provided player's level or -1 on error (unreachable servers, not a player, etc)
